content:
1. This Act may be cited as the Degrees and Diplomas Act 1962.
Corresponding degrees and diplomas

2. (1)  Where the possession of any degree or diploma of
the former University of Malaya confers any qualification or
right under any written law passed or made before the year 1962,
the like qualification or right under that law shall be conferred by
possession of the corresponding degree or diploma of the present
University of Malaya or of the University of Singapore.
(2)  In this Act “the former University of Malaya” means the
University established and incorporated under the University of
Malaya Ordinance 1949 [Ord. 17 of 1949], and the “present University
of Malaya” means the University of Malaya established and
incorporated under the University of Malaya Act 1961 [Act 44 of
1961].
6

DEGREES AND DIPLOMAS ACT 1962
